uploadDescription: Choose the PDF you want to render into image files.
localOnlyNote: Runs locally in your browser. No uploads.
settingsDescription: Pick an image format, render density, and export scope.
dpiDescription: Higher DPI creates larger, sharper images and uses more memory.
qualityDescription: Controls JPG and WebP compression. PNG ignores this setting.
previewDescription: Review the selected page before downloading one image or exporting all pages.
emptyPreviewDescription: Upload a PDF to preview pages and export them as images.
renderingPreviewDescription: Preparing the selected page with the current export settings.
unsupportedFileError: Unsupported file type. Please choose a PDF file.
loadFailedError: Failed to load the PDF file.
invalidPdfError: Invalid PDF file. Please upload a valid PDF.
renderFailedError: Failed to render the selected page.
canvasUnavailableError: Canvas rendering is unavailable in this browser.
canvasExportFailedError: Failed to generate output image data.
